title: Hcameron
compiled_truth: Hcameron is an external contact at [Uclink](companies/uclink). Over the corpus period (2000-08-23 to 2001-04-03), Hcameron sent 10 and received 51 emails, totalling 61 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (10), [Lfried](people/lfried-uclink) (7), [Amosher](people/amosher-appanet) (7), [Whederman](people/whederman-columbiaenergygroup) (7), [Rob Gramlich](people/rob-gramlich-neg) (6).
